title: Fix broken support of unassigned virtual interfaces (#6253)

features.name: interface with input port in package context
features.description: Code should include an interface definition with an input port declared within a package context

features.name: class with virtual interface member in package
features.description: Code should include a class with a virtual interface member variable declared within a package

features.name: empty module referencing package class with virtual interface
features.description: Code should include an empty module that references a class containing a virtual interface member in a package
